title: Mouroucoa cordifolia

This family is further divided into many different genera, with Mouroucoa cordifolia being one of them. The plant is a species of flowering plant that is native to tropical Africa. Mouroucoa cordifolia is a relatively rare species, and it is not as well-studied or widely known as some other members of the Rubiaceae family. More research is needed to fully understand the classification and characteristics of this unique and interesting plant.
